name: Grade 4 Mathematics — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 4 pathway for fraction and decimal reasoning, geometry, data, and multi-step modeling. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 4 knowledge and transferable skills in fraction and decimal reasoning, geometry, data, and multi-step modeling.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about fraction and decimal reasoning, geometry, data, and multi-step modeling and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
